Hero.title: 🎉 Al Ahsa Shopping Festival
Hero.subtitle: 4 Weeks • 5 Days/Week • Thu–Mon • 4 PM – 11 PM
Hero.tagline: An economic activation platform bringing families, youth, and merchants to the heart of Al Ahsa

Vision.title: Strategic Vision
Vision.whyAlAhsaDesc: UNESCO heritage city • Family-first culture • Underserved summer market
Vision.whySummerDesc: Schools closed • Families home • Long dwell time 4-11 PM
Vision.whyFamiliesDesc: Families spend more • Stay longer • Return again
Vision.whyShoppingGamingDesc: Gaming brings youth • Youth bring families • Families shop

Zones.title: 6 Festival Zones
Zones.marketplaceDesc: 200+ booths • Daily flash sales • Digital payments • Instant prizes
Zones.familyDesc: Kids workshops • Stage shows • Family competitions • Daily prizes
Zones.foodDesc: Local restaurants • Food trucks • Cooking shows • Date experience
Zones.gamingDesc: Free gaming • Daily tournaments • Influencer challenges
Zones.heritageDesc: Palm workshops • Traditional arts • Heritage storytelling
Zones.stageDesc: Flash sale announcements • Prizes • Live shows • Closing ceremony

Footer.dates: 📅 June 10 – July 10, 2026 • 📍 Al Ahsa • ⏰ 4 PM – 11 PM
